decisions.decision: Extension owns its own subprocess dispatch via spawning pi --mode json
decisions.rationale: Independence from pi-subagents — two tools can coexist without shared state or import relationship

decisions.decision: Main conversation is the control plane; workflows are subordinate work
decisions.rationale: User never loses their interactive session — when workflow completes, conversation continues with the result

decisions.decision: Fail-fast on step failure in sequential execution
decisions.rationale: Simplest correct behavior for phase 1 — no partial results, no recovery complexity

decisions.decision: Expression evaluator supports property access only — no arithmetic, no logic, no function calls
decisions.rationale: Push logic into transform steps where it's explicit and testable, keep ${{ }} simple and predictable

decisions.decision: Pipe syntax for formatting: ${{ path | duration }}, ${{ path | currency }}, ${{ path | json }}
decisions.rationale: Formatting is display concern, not logic — safe to add to expressions without crossing into computation

decisions.decision: Output validation is post-hoc AJV after step completes
decisions.rationale: In-loop validation (steering agent toward schema compliance) adds complexity — defer to later phase

decisions.decision: State persisted via atomic write (tmp file + rename)
decisions.rationale: Crash safety — partial writes never corrupt state.json

decisions.decision: Completion field uses ${{ }} syntax consistently, not {{ }} Nunjucks syntax
decisions.rationale: Completion templates resolve against CompletionScope which extends ExpressionScope — same engine, same syntax

decisions.decision: Two mutually exclusive completion forms: template (inline interpolation) or message + include (instruction text with data attachments)
decisions.rationale: Template form for simple cases, message+include for structured data injection into LLM context

decisions.decision: Artifacts support latest overwrite pattern and runId-stamped history accumulation
decisions.rationale: latest.md always current without knowing run ID; timestamped files accumulate history for comparison

decisions.decision: buildConservativePlan() adds implicit sequential deps for steps without explicit ${{ steps.X }} refs
decisions.rationale: Parallelism is opt-in — safe default prevents unintended concurrent side effects

decisions.decision: Phase 3 parallelism limited to read-only/structured-output workflows
decisions.rationale: Parallel steps writing to working directory share cwd and may interfere — filesystem isolation deferred

decisions.decision: compileAgentSpec() renders both system and task prompts through Nunjucks unconditionally
decisions.rationale: No hasTemplateSyntax gate needed — plain text renders to itself, template syntax renders correctly

decisions.decision: ${{ }} workflow expressions protected from Nunjucks interpretation during template rendering
decisions.rationale: Two expression syntaxes coexist — Nunjucks must not interpret ${{ }} as its own {{ }}

decisions.decision: Three-tier resource resolution: .pi/<dir>/ > ~/.pi/agent/<dir>/ > <package>/<dir>/
decisions.rationale: Project-level overrides user-level overrides package defaults — standard precedence

decisions.decision: Resume reuses run dir and state, layer loop skips completed steps, re-runs failed steps
decisions.rationale: Partial parallel layers resume correctly — only pending steps in each layer execute

decisions.decision: Three pause mechanisms: workflow-authored (pause: step), user-initiated (Ctrl+H), crash recovery
decisions.rationale: Deliberate pause points, interactive control, and crash safety are three distinct use cases needing unified resume

decisions.decision: Every step writes output as JSON to disk via persistStepOutput() — file system is the data bus
decisions.rationale: One workflow's output is another workflow's input. StepResult.outputPath holds the absolute path.

decisions.decision: Agent specs are YAML declaring typed contracts; .md is compiled at dispatch time from spec + templates + input
decisions.rationale: The .md exists in memory for milliseconds — written to temp file, passed to pi, deleted. Never hand-authored.

decisions.decision: Project structure decomposed into typed JSON blocks that templates compose from
decisions.rationale: Master planning doc is a monolith — no part independently injectable into agent prompts. Blocks enable selective context injection.

decisions.decision: Budget enforcement deferred — accumulation via addUsage() works but no ceiling gate
decisions.rationale: Needs design for configurable actions (pause, fail, warn) — accumulation sufficient for now
